steps.name: network-haptics
steps.summary: useNetworkStatus 훅, OfflineBanner 컴포넌트, lib/haptics.ts 구현 및 useLike/useFollow/useBookmark에 haptics.light() 추가

steps.name: onboarding
steps.summary: useOnboarding 훅(Zustand + AsyncStorage), app/onboarding.tsx 3단계 화면(환영/도구선택/추천작가), _layout.tsx 온보딩 분기 추가

steps.name: empty-error-states
steps.summary: PRD 3-12 빈 상태 메시지 전 화면 적용, 팔로잉/홈 액션 버튼 추가, ArtworkCard에 BookmarkButton 추가
